# May 30 2006 at 6:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758692080
View User Forum
17 posts
That usally happens when someone sells it to the npc. If there is an unlimited quantity than the npc sells it, if not the npc is reselling something someone else sold to the npc.

QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2003 at 10:29 PM Rating: Decent

32 posts
I found one of these on a Sporali Scavenger in Runnyeye Citadel today.
▲ Page top
Different Fire Emerald
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2003 at 3:22 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781418679
37 posts
I have been searching and searching for info on a 'Chipped Fire Emerald' I picked up somewhere.. it's been so long ago but Im thinking it was in Crystal Caverns. The 'Chipped Fire Emerald' I picked up has +2STR, +2DEX on it & weighs same as usual gems, but I have never seen a gem with stats on it before it is made into jewelry. Does anyone have an idea what it's used for ? Will it make some special item with Jewelcraft ? Any help is greatly appreciated as this thing has been in my bank for close to 5 months.
▲ Page top
RE: Different Fire Emerald
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2003 at 1:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1686529028957
Scholar
342 posts
These gems may not be usable in jewelry, but they CAN be used while INSIDE CrystalCaverns. If you drop one in the first inventory slot, your stats change to reflect the stone's attributes.

Cannot recall at the moment if this interfered with food and drink attributes. It may have stacked if you had the stone first. But I cannot swear to this part. Only that they DO WORK if you are in CC zone.

Also, the merchants pay handily for them...  :)

(below is a posting I responded to from http://www.allakhazam.com/db/skills.html?skill=6&start=150)


Quote:

Well, i have found many chipped Gems, off the geonids in CC zone... None of th egems i have found (apparently) are used for any of the Thur, or keal armor quests (velious)... These Gems Do have stats of thier own. For instance, a chipped black sapphire is <i believe> 1 ac 10 mana and 10HP. The quest gems i have for armor DO NOT HAVE STATS. Enchanted gems?? Maybe (hehe hopefully =) adding even more stats to certain jewelry? haven't had the guts to try yet.  =P
Anyway, this is a list of the gemstones i have acquired.

Chipped Black sapphire
Chipped carnelien
Chipped Black pearl
Chipped Malachite
Chipped Sapphire
Chipped Star Ruby
Chipped Pearl
▲ Page top
Monk Item!!
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2002 at 1:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592345389683
4 posts
Look at the weight! This is for Monks!!






Sorry after mindlessly reading that so many times for every item in EQ it was an autonomic response
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 02 2002 at 12:27 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) lol, stop smokin crack, just because it has very low wieght doesn't mean it's a monk item. I mean sure, warriors have high str. Wouldn't you think a strong warrior would love to carry as many of these things as possible caues of it's low wieght? And just imagine how much pp he could get from selling these things to other players if he had a bunch of em. :P And it says class:all so it's for everyone, not just monks :)
RE: Monk Item!!
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2002 at 9:01 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251864034
10 posts

Drops
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2001 at 11:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766502403
View User Forum
16 posts
They also drop off Lord PickClaw in Runnyeye.

Got a Grotesque Mask, a BABS and a Fire Emerald in one drop on his corpse.
▲ Page top
Where to BUY
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2001 at 5:47 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have found that finding these is not easy... well... actually... IT IS! Instead of going to a shop that sells all different kinds of gems, go to one that sells bars or metal, and jewlry kits. They have some of the more odd gems, like Fire Emeralds, and Star Rubies...
Hope this helps... :)
▲ Page top
drop
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 8:19 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246231214
7 posts
They drop off of seafuries in oot also

Jeweler by bank in Cab
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 1:12 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247057871
2 posts
I ahve looked all in that vendor! All I see is a regular emerald. I must be blind because I haven't seen one.

RE: Jeweler by bank in Cab
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2001 at 5:26 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
You can buy the fire emerald from the male jeweler in cabilis. the female has regular emeralds.
▲ Page top
Drops
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2001 at 1:58 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Try killing sarnacks in Lake of Ill Omen and the Overthere, they can drop all sorts of gems, the higher level ones have better drops, and conveniently raises faction in Cabillis too =)

Drop

how can an iksar get one ???

# Feb 20 2001 at 10:00 AM Rating: Default

were do i get a fire emerald ?
▲ Page top
Iksars and Fire Emeralds
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2001 at 8:05 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Okay this item is need for a number of Quests for Iksars so heres where to get one. You need to go to The Overthere which means travelling trough the agro territory of the Warslik Woods. Once you reach The Overthere you need to go to the Docks and find Tin Merchant IV (Loc 2634 2525) who sells all types of Gems. You can expect to pay anywhere from 85pp-109pp for the Fire Emerald depending on your charisma. Good Luck.


Asraguard Arcanath
▲ Page top
